creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Since the transition to Git, I suspect that this particular wrapping issue should no longer occur. 

Compare bug 244323 comment 5 with, for example: 

* bug 255980 comment 24
* bug 260153 comment 1
* bug 261704 comment 1
* bug 264557 comment 6. 

I'll now perform a summary line-based cheat here (please, do not follow this example) …
